text.div:
RwandaHIV

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/ImplementationGuide/openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv

xxxA brief description of what this IG is about

name: RwandaHIV
title: Rwanda HIV
description: xxxA brief description of what this IG is about

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology

resource.name: Sample reordered
resource.description: The sample was reordered.

resource.name: Target Facility Encounter
resource.description: This profile represents the current facility at which the patient is receiving treatment.

resource.name: HIV Viral Load Result Revised By
resource.description: The user index for the person who reviewed the viral load result.

resource.name: Patient Pregnancy Status
resource.description: This profile is to record the pregnacy status for the patient.

resource.name: Performing Organization Province
resource.description: The province index for the performing organization.

resource.name: Practitioner
resource.description: The healthcare professional who has been assigned to a given lab task.

resource.name: Requesting Organization
resource.description: Organization requesting for HIV testing services.

resource.name: Patient's Adherence to ARV Treatment
resource.description: ARV adherence.

resource.name: HIV Viral Load Result Tested By
resource.description: The user index for the person who tested the viral load specimen.

resource.name: Diagnosis
resource.description: This profile represents the confirmation of HIV diagnosis.

resource.name: Specimen Conservation
resource.description: Specimen conservation information.

resource.name: Patient Age In Years
resource.description: Age of the patient calculated in years.

resource.name: Specimen Type Used In Viral Load testing
resource.description: A list of specimen types.

resource.name: Viral Load Result Code
resource.description: A code used to indicate the category for the lab result.

resource.name: Lab Results
resource.description: The result of the lab test which determines whether the patient is infected with HIV or not.

resource.name: Result Status Index
resource.description: The result status index.

resource.name: Performing Organization District
resource.description: The district index for the performing organization.

resource.name: Implementing Partner Organization
resource.description: Implementing partner organization.

resource.name: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected
resource.description: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected.

resource.name: Patient
resource.description: A patient resource for an HIV Patient

resource.name: Diagnostic Report
resource.description: A report as a result of the lab task being completed.

resource.name: HIV Lab Order Task Activity
resource.description: HIV lab order task activity.

resource.name: Patient Enrollment Type
resource.description: This profile is used to enrol the patient into HIV care.

resource.name: HIV Patient Is New
resource.description: This profile is to record whether an HIV patient is new.

resource.name: Sample Dispatched to Lab Task
resource.description: Sample dispatched to lab task.

resource.name: ARV Treatment
resource.description: This profile is to record prescribed ARV regimen

resource.name: Funding Organization
resource.description: Funding organization.

resource.name: Clinician User Index
resource.description: The user index for the person who is requesting or performing the service request.

resource.name: Performing Organization
resource.description: Organization responsible for carrying out the HIV testing services.

resource.name: Lab Order
resource.description: A service request that initiates the need for the lab to collect the test sample.

resource.name: Reasons for ARV Regimen Change
resource.description: Used by the careplan to indicate the reason why a patient had their ARV regimen changed.

resource.name: Lab Task
resource.description: Assists with tracking the state of the lab order and its completion status.

resource.name: Date HIV Test Done
resource.description: This profile is to record the date when HIV test was done for a patient.

resource.name: Funding Organization
resource.description: The index for the funding organization.

resource.name: Breastfeeding Patient
resource.description: Breastfeeding patient.

resource.name: HIV Organization
resource.description: Organization providing HIV Testing Services.

resource.name: ART Regimen Switched Or Substituted
resource.description: The ARV regimen has been switched to a new ARV regimen or has been substituted by another ARV regimen.

resource.name: Viral Load Suppressions Status
resource.description: Describes a patient's current viral load status.

resource.name: Conditions
resource.description: A list of possible HIV conditions.

resource.name: Patient Pregnant
resource.description: Used by the observation to indicate whether a patient is pregnant.

resource.name: ARV Treatment Medication Request
resource.description: Codes used to represent a medication request for ART.

resource.name: Patient Age In Months
resource.description: Age of the patient calculated in months.

resource.name: ARV Adherence
resource.description: ARV Adherence

resource.name: Viral Load Specimen
resource.description: The test sample that was collected for the initiated lab order.

resource.name: A list of ARV regimen
resource.description: A list of ARV regimen.

resource.name: Implementing Partner Organization
resource.description: The index for the implementing partner organization.

resource.name: Test Types
resource.description: A list of HIV test types

resource.name: Reason for Assessment or Test Not Performed
resource.description: A list of reasons associated with the service request for the lab order.

resource.name: HIV Test Done
resource.description: Used by the observation to indicate that a HIV test was performed.
